chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1123 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.03.2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to respondents No.3 to 5 to decide his application regarding maintaining the entry in the Revenue record in respect of Plot No. C-4 admeasuring 2700 sq. ft. and Plots No. F-56 and F-65 admeasuring 120 sq. ft. each, situated in Pakistan Railway Employees Cooperative Housing Society, Airport Road, Sukkur. Learned Counsel for the petitioner contends that the petitioner has already filed an application with aforesaid respondents on 15.03.2022 (copy whereof is available as Annexure ‘F’ at Page-109 to 111 of the memo of petition), yet no order has been passed by the said respondents. Learned A.A.G. contends that most probably the Pakistan Railway Employees Cooperative Housing Society has been established on the land which belongs to Pakistan Railway Department as per his information; however, Mukhitarkar concerned may be directed to decide the application of the petitioner in accordance with law and for that he has no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing to respondent No.5 to decide the application of the petitioner within thirty days hereof and compliance thereof be submitted before this Court through the Additional Registrar. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
